title: Service launched
description: Mt. Gox began operating as a Bitcoin exchange.

title: Withdrawals suspended
description: Mt. Gox suspended withdrawals during its crisis period.

title: Bankruptcy proceedings commenced
description: Tokyo District Court commenced bankruptcy proceedings for MtGox Co., Ltd. on April 24, 2014.

title: Service launched
description: FTX began operating as a centralized exchange.

title: Chapter 11 filing and collapse
description: FTX and affiliated debtors filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection on November 11, 2022.

title: Exchange officially launched
description: Binance announced that the exchange would officially launch on July 14, 2017.

title: Service launched
description: QuadrigaCX launched as a centralized exchange.

title: CCAA protection and insolvency crisis
description: Quadriga sought and received CCAA protection on February 5, 2019 after the platform had shut down on January 28, 2019.

title: FinCEN penalties and U.S. enforcement action
description: FinCEN assessed penalties against BTC-e on July 26, 2017 as U.S. enforcement action escalated.

title: Protocol publicly announced and deployed
description: Uniswap's official history states that Uniswap was publicly announced and deployed to Ethereum mainnet on November 2, 2018.

title: Protocol launched in August 2020
description: Official Sushi docs and blog materials describe SushiSwap as launching in August 2020.
notes: Month-level marker used because the source set here supports August 2020 but not a precise launch day.

title: January 2019 exchange hack
description: Official liquidation materials describe a serious January 2019 hack that caused severe operational and reputational damage.
notes: Month-level date kept because the official source used here confirms January 2019 but not a precise day.

title: Liquidators appointed and trading suspended
description: Grant Thornton stated on 15 May 2019 that liquidators had been appointed the previous day and that trading was suspended.

title: Launch date candidate from source list
description: Draft launch date candidate derived from coingecko_cex.

title: Launch date candidate from source list
description: Draft launch date candidate derived from coingecko_cex.
notes: Month-level source normalized to first day of month.
